Petition For Approval Of Agreement Settling Will Contest And Probate Code 850 Petition
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young and Ed Koplowitz for and with Rudy Carlotti, Sr.

The Petition for Approval of Agreement Settling Will Contest was taken under submission for the idea of the Court reviewing the petition again to see if a Guardian Ad Litem will be appointed for representation of Annetta. The Court also spoke of establishment of a Special Needs Trust and it being brought under Court jurisdiction.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy S. Neu.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-18-2011 Continued To Jun-29-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Rudy Carlotti (will contest). Ed Koplowitz for Rudy Carlotti (850 Petition). Amanda Ebey for John Rouse. Aneeta Carlotti, Rudolph Carlotti, Sr. and Caroline Keeling were also present.

Mr. Koplowitz advised the Court that he filed an 850 Petition yesterday with a June 15, 2011 hearing date. Ms. Ebey stated that some discovery was still outstanding, that it was her sense that her Client should be named Executor of the Estate and requested a trial date on the will contest. Ms. Young requested a Special Administrator (impartial and independent) be appointed. The Parties agreed to a settlement conference. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to June 29, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will send notice of time and place of the settlement conference.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Continued To May-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for and with Rudy Carlotti. Amanda Ebey for John Rouse. Anita Carlotti (Daughter) also present.

The matter was continued to May 18, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of final discovery and trial setting (estimated length of trial more than 2 days).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Continued To Mar-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for and with Rudy Carlotti Sr. Amamda Ebey for and with John Rouse.

Ms. Ebey stated that they have not reached a settlement, that they were still in discussions and asked the Court to set a trial date. Ms. young stated that her Client needs time to consider the new offer and time to retain litigation Counsel. The matter was continued to March 16, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2010 Continued To Feb-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with John Rouse. Marilyn Young for Rudolph Carlotti.

The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 10, 2011. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 10, 2011 as well. The matter was continued to February 16, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
